name: io.github.Kochava/kochava-for-advertisers-mcp-server
title: Kochava for Advertisers
description: No account needed — connect, sign up, and query mobile attribution data from any AI tool

headers.name: authentication-key
headers.description: Your Kochava API key. Leave empty to use FAA signup tools to create a free account and receive a key in-session.
